title: juncus filiformis var. transsilvanicus
intro: Juncus filiformis var. transsilvanicus, also known as Slender Club-rush, is a plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family, characterized by its slender, grass-like stems and dark green leaves. Traditionally, the Slender Club-rush has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include alleviating symptoms of asthma, reducing fever, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Juncus filiformis var. transsilvanicus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
